title.native: 꼭두

description:
Jacob, an 11-year-old boy who is looking for kokdu dolls to remember his last moments with his grandmother, accidentally enters the world of these dolls.

The "kokdu", literally "funeral doll", a key element in the work, is a wooden doll that adorned the bier (a carriage that carried a coffin) in the funeral culture of the Joseon Dynasty. It was considered a being that accompanied and protected the deceased, so that they would not feel lonely on their way to the afterlife. These dolls, which appeared in various forms, such as warriors, servants, clowns, and guides, embody the philosophy of Joseon-era Koreans, who viewed death not as something to be feared, but as a warm farewell and a new journey.

(Source: Etoday, translated)

title.native: THE FOX ELEVATOR BOY RENARD

description:
Renard, a young fox disguised as a human, works as an elevator boy in a prestigious department store, diligently carrying out his duties day after day while hiding his true form reflected in the mirror. Beneath his mask of a charming, fake smile, his cold eyes gleam as he hunts for his next prey.

(Source: YouTube Description, translated)

Third-year student project by Nagomi Ueno for the Tama Arts University 2024 academic year.

title.native: ににふにの庭

description:
Two young souls, each other’s mirrored reflection and also polar opposite, are born from matching lotus flowers into an idyllic grove, where a gaunt figure greets them with an offering of a freshly plucked fruit. Partaking of its sweetness is not without consequences.

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

title.native: 砂塵ノ中デ

description:
A young girl arrives of the surface of a harsh and dangerous world. There she meets a boy prepared to confront those dangers. Each is there with a purpose, as the world around them gradually falls apart, atom by atom—or rather, datum by datum.

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

title.native: もし、これから生まれるのなら

description:
Among a primordial ocean of stars, two innocent, identical children share a vessel. It comes to ground on a strange, liminal world, where a mischievous spirit appears, announcing itself as their guide on the nine-month journey ahead of them. Here in the world we know, meanwhile, a bereaved and pregnant woman struggles with grief and terrible uncertainty.

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

Note: Originally released on March 6, 2026 as a part of "Gemnibus Vol. 2" anthology, however was also simultaneously selected to screen, and then later premiered at Fantasia International Film Festival.

title.native: 20001年 地球の旅

description:
Captain Kepo and his crew, the inquisitive agent Alcia and naive junior teammate Rigel, arrive on an alien planet to explore, and attempt to understand, the mysterious remnants of a highly intelligent species that was once dominant, and is now long departed. The planet these three strange creatures are visiting? Earth.

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

title.native: JUNK END

description:
Final movie of the JUNK trilogy.
Set after the story in JUNK HEAD.

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: るすばん

description:
Set in August 1987, the story follows one day in the life of Tokko as she stays at home in a large house while her family is away.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.romaji: Ore dake Level Up na Ken: Beyond the System
title.native: 俺だけレベルアップな件 - Beyond the System -

description: Sequel movie to Ore dake Level Up na Ken: Season 2 - Arise from the Shadow.

title.native: アイカツスターズ！ ～星々のProgress～

description: A movie celebrating the Aikatsu Stars's 10th anniversary.

title.native: LUCA

description: Ai Nina’s first original animated short film telling the story of Nene, a student who encounters a mysterious shapeshifting being named Luca.

title.native: 南へ行ったミースケ

description:
Jumping out of the cupboard, Chi-cha and Ikeho ask for Misuke's help, saying that they have to answer a quiz that the god Don-dan has given them to save their mother. Misuke then heads for a country in the south passing right through the cupboard.

(Source: Official Website)

Note: Second promotional film made to attract new students to Yahama's electronic organ classes.

title.romaji: Takopii no Genzai: Arigatou, Mata Ashita
title.native: タコピーの原罪 -ありがとう、また明日-

description: Theatrical compilation of all six episodes of the anime series Takopii no Genzai, including newly added scenes.

title.native: GIGANT

description:
Rei dreams of becoming a big-ticket film director, but when he stumbles into a chance meeting with a busty adult film star, his high school life takes a turn for the strange. Not only does his favorite porn star like him, she gains the power to grow to an enormous, towering size! Is alien technology to blame? Time travel? The end of the world? All manner of bizarre trouble lies ahead, and a gigantic, gorgeous woman is just the tip of the iceberg!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.native: 海が走るエンドロール

description:
Umiko, a grandma, realizes that she has the same desire to make movies as university student Kai—and soon she enrolls in Kai's film school!

"It's not the movies you like…you like watching the people watching the movies."

Just what are you going to do with the rest of your life? It's the question you'll always have to answer, no matter your age. Umiko Chino is a 65-year-old retired woman in mourning for her late husband. Remembering how they used to watch films together, Umiko goes to the movie theater for the first time in years, where she meets Kai, an attractive, ambiguous young man who studies filmmaking at a nearby art school.

They would seem to have nothing in common, except for this—both of them sometimes like to look more at the way the audience reacts to a movie than the movie itself. Kai believes Umiko has the same deep desire he possesses to experience how people respond to something they made… and challenges her to stake the rest of her life discovering that thrill.

Soon Umiko surprises herself by enrolling in the same film school as Kai. But sailing into this new sea, she's suddenly inside the currents of her fellow students' lives, a much younger generation that she struggles to understand, driven by their own passions and their own relationships. Who's really experienced at life, and is it old age or observation that brings wisdom? And does what you're looking for change when you look with your eyes instead of through a camera lens…?

(Source: Dark Horse)

title.native: 鯨を夢む

description:
Graduation work of Shuzuku.

A girl wanders through a landscape of quiet ruin, alone except for her dog and a mysterious voice on her radio, reciting poems at a precise hour every day. A haunting memory of a nearby future.

(Source: Fantasia International Film Festival)

Notes:
- Selected and pre-screened at the Fantasia International Film Festival as a part of the Anime no Bento official selection on July 19, 2025.
- Won the Grand Prix at the Kochi Anime Creator Award 2025 out of 30 nominated works.

title.native: ファーストライン

description:
Young animator Mito feels trapped between the demands of a difficult sequence, a tight deadline, debilitating self-doubt, and a seemingly deranged director. Sometimes the only way to get to the other side is to charge right through.

(Source: Fantasia International Film Festival)

Note: Originally released on June 28, 2024 as a part of "Gemnibus Vol. 1" anthology, however was also simultaneously selected to screen, and then later premiered at Fantasia International Film Festival.

title.native: THE RIBBON HERO

description:
Princess Sapphire of the lost kingdom. Stripped of everything in her homeland, Silverland, by the calamity known as "Nergal," she arrived in Goldland at the very depths of despair. While carrying the weight of her past, she began to find a glimmer of hope through the kindness of the people. Yet, as if mocking her peaceful daily life, the calamity "Nergal" appears once more. The same despair that reduced her homeland to ashes is now threatening to steal the light from this land as well.

"No more loss for me. No more loss for anyone.”

Wiping way her fears of sorrow, the young girl takes up her sword.
This is the story of a hero who ties her ribbon and resolves to defy fate.

(Source: THE RIBBON HERO Official Site)

Note: This anime is inspired by Osamu Tezuka's manga "Princess Knight”.

title.native: ぼうぼう君

description:
Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru".

A short film of a fire demon called "Bobo-kun," eating one piece of coal after another. This character would later be re-used as Calcifer, who appears in Howl's Moving Castle.

title.native: ぴよぴよバーバ

description:
Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru".

Yubaba, a character from Spirited Away, returns in this short. She turns to the front, opens her mouth and laughs, and when she turns 180 degrees and turns backward, a small bird comes out of her hair and screams. When the little bird retracts into her hair, Yubaba turns 180 degrees again, turns to the front, and laughs once more.

title.native: 魔女の谷の夜

description:
A short film only screened at the Cinema Orion at Ghibli Park in Nagakute.

The film is set in Ghibli Park's "Valley of the Witches" and is the first original animated short film created by Studio Ghibli for Ghibli Park.

title.native: CHERRY AND VIRGIN

description:
Cherry and Virgin is a romantic comedy featuring a 32-year-old "eromanga" author Ryou and a 28-year-old "fujoshi'' Ami. Neither character is great at interacting with members of the opposite gender—Ryou is somewhat of an otaku and defenseless against women, and Ami does not have a good impression of 3D men. After a fateful encounter, the story follows the two as they learn to navigate a sea of interpersonal relationships and come to better understand the bitter and sweet aspects of modern relationships.

(Source: MAL News)

title.english: SHIBOYUGI: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table 44: CLOUDY BEACH
title.romaji: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44: CLOUDY BEACH
title.native: 死亡遊戯で飯を食う。44:CLOUDY BEACH

description:
Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.

This is the story of a certain insane world.

Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games.

Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki continues her journey. A game where death is always close at hand. Next, she takes on a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Eight players have gathered there. Among them are seasoned veterans whom Yuuki knows. The game is "Cloudy Beach." Beyond the wall, only those who have crossed the wall remain. Today, once again, she makes a living playing deadly games.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

title.native: Unanswered//butterfly: Sword Art Online

description:
The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality.

Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK (Player Killer) known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party—was the Black Swordsman.

Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

Note: Released as part of the Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online's game limited edition.

title.native: ロカ！

description:
The story takes place in a world where human civilization has collapsed and fallen into ruin.
In this world, there are people who live in groups and people who live individually, moving around. – a world of freedom, so to speak.
Two girls, Haru and Tamo, who live in such a world, board an old train they come across by chance and travel through the decadent world day by day.

(Source: Niigata International Animation Film Festival)

Notes:
- Initially pre-screened at the Niigata International Animation Film Festival on March 15, 2025, as well as at the Fantasia Film Festival on July 19, 2025.
- Selected for the Fantasia Film Festival Anime no Bento official selection highlighting indie talent, as well as winning the audience award and gold award in the Animated Short category at the Fantasia Film Festival 2025.

title.native: 銀河鉄道999～ガラスのクレア～（3D）

description:
Remake of the Glass no Clair special, featuring a 3D stereoscopic animation based on the original work by Leiji Matsumoto.

This is the second time Matsumoto's work has been made into a 3D film.

title.romaji: Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e
title.native: どこよりも遠い場所にいる君へ

description:
The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an unconscious girl. When she comes to after Kazuki takes her to the clinic, she is unable to give out anything about her identity except that she is named Nao, is 16 years old, and whispers the year "1974."

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: 金星人愛情故事

description:
Hsiao Hsia, a girl in the fifth grade, pretend to be "Venusians" during their summer vacation, playing pranks on adults troubled with love.

Unexpectedly, their pranks succeed, making the Venusians famous and leading to the establishment of the "Venusians Agency", where they start offering advice to those troubled with love.

However, on the seventh day before the summer vacation ends, Hsia becomes troubled by her own worries. Her life as a Venusian continues until she meets a blonde woman named Ching Tien. After they resonate with each other's struggles, things start to change. For both of them, the meaning of "love" will be revealed, and they will find their own answers.

(Source: 24.5 Image Production YouTube Channel, translated)

title.romaji: Mao he Lao Shu: Xing Pan qi Yuan
title.native: 猫和老鼠：星盘奇缘

description:
Tom and Jerry: Forbidden Compass follows the iconic cat-and-mouse duo as they accidentally travel through time in a museum. Along their journey, they meet a group of intriguing new companions and become involved in a final showdown with mysterious forces.

(Source: Deadline)

Note: The film's runtime was cut down for the US release, shortening it to 92 minutes. Premiered at the Shanghai International Film Festival on June 20, 2025.

title.romaji: Sinbi Apateu 10-junyeon Geugjangpan: Han Beon Deo, Sohwan
title.native: 신비아파트 10주년 극장판: 한 번 더, 소환

description: Tidak ada deskripsi.

title.romaji: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to
title.native: 君と花火と約束と

description:
The story centers on two Tokyo high schoolers who connect over a painting of fireworks. They trace the painting to the Nagaoka Fireworks Festival in Niigata, one of Japan's three major fireworks festivals, and to a mysterious promise that connects the two to the past.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title.native: Summer Pockets 鳴瀬しろは編

description:
Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Shiroha Naruse storyline from the anime series.

Shiroha, a girl who keeps her distance from the people on the island and is always alone, gradually begins to open up to Hairi, who unreservedly gets closer to her.

Over the course of the summer, Hairi witnesses the "mysterious power" that Shiroha possesses...

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title.native: Summer Pockets 空門蒼編

description:
Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Ao Sorakado's storyline from the anime series.

While Hairi becomes close to Ao, a girl from the island who always seems sleepy for some reason, he witnesses Ao carrying out a "duty" that has been passed down through the generations of the Sorakado family.

While helping with this "duty", Hairi learns the secret of the "butterfly" and Ao's true purpose.

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title.native: Summer Pockets 紬ヴェンダース編

description:
Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Tsugumi Wender's storyline from the anime series.

Tsugumi Wenders, a girl who lives in a lighthouse on an island, has to return to a distant land when summer ends. Tsumugi, along with Hairi and Shizuku, decides to spend the rest of her summer vacation searching for what she wants to do.

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title.native: 광장

description:
Tall, blonde and blue-eyed, it is impossible not to notice Isak Borg, First Secretary to the Swedish Embassy in Pyongyang. As a diplomat, he is under constant surveillance and strongly discouraged from interacting with the locals. Despite this, he secretly dates Bok-joo, a local traffic officer, but when one last effort to extend his stay is rejected, Isak begs her to come back to Stockholm with him. Bok-joo turns this idea down and abruptly disappears. Oblivious to the danger he is putting the woman he loves in, Isak asks Myeong-jun, his assigned interpreter, for help. When Myeong-jun refuses, a desperate Isak becomes increasingly suspicious of everyone.

(Source: Tribeca Film)

title.romaji: Soukou Kihei Votoms: Haiiro no Hexe
title.native: 装甲騎兵ボトムズ 灰色の魔女

description:
In January 2026, Bandai Namco Filmworks announced an new anime project titled Armored Trooper VOTOMS: Die Graue Hexe. It is set to premiere in 2026 will be produced by Sunrise with production assistance by Production I.G, and will be part of a series of projects commemorating studio Sunrise's 50th anniversary to be released between 2026 and 2028.

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

description: Sequel movie to Majo no Tabitabi.

description:
Theatrical conclusion of Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai, based on an original story written by Aka Akasaka.

title.romaji: Ginga Tokkyuu Milky☆Subway: Kakueki Teisha Gekijou Yuki
title.native: 銀河特急 ミルキー☆サブウェイ 各駅停車劇場行き

description:
Theatrical version of Ginga Tokkyuu Milky☆Subway with additional new scenes.

Six delinquents are tasked with cleaning a train as part of a community service program. But when the train suddenly takes off, chaos ensues.

(Source: Netflix)

description: The last out of six movie sequels to the Princess Principal TV series.

title.native: プリンセス・プリンシパル Crown Handler 第5章

description: The fifth out of six movie sequels to the Princess Principal TV series.

title.english: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Execution -Shibuya Incident x The Culling Game Begins-
title.romaji: Jujutsu Kaisen: Shibuya Jihen Tokubetsu Henshuu-ban x Shimetsu Kaiyuu Senkou Jouei
title.native: 呪術廻戦『渋谷事変 特別編集版』×『死滅回游 先行上映』

description:
Movie compilation of the Shibuya Incident Arc from the second season of Jujutsu Kaisen and the first two episodes of the third season's Culling Game Arc.

A veil abruptly descends over the busy Shibuya area amid the bustling Halloween crowds, trapping countless civilians inside. Satoru Gojo, the strongest jujutsu sorcerer, steps into the chaos. But lying in wait are curse users and spirits scheming to seal him away.

Yuji Itadori, accompanied by his classmates and other top-tier jujutsu sorcerers, enters the fray in an unprecedented clash of curses — the Shibuya Incident.

In the aftermath, ten colonies across Japan are transformed into dens of curses in a plan orchestrated by Noritoshi Kamo, the most wicked sorcerer in history. As the deadly Culling Game starts, Special Grade sorcerer Yuta Okkotsu is assigned to carry out Yuji’s execution for his perceived crimes.

(Source: GKIDS)

title.romaji: Himitsu no AiPri: Mankai Buzzrium Live!
title.native: ひみつのアイプリ まんかいバズリウムライブ！

description: Movie of Himitsu no AiPri, first announced at the Pretty Series Crossing Live 2025.

title.romaji: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu
title.native: 映画ちいかわ 人魚の島のひみつ

description:
Based on a series of Chiikawa comics posted on X by Nagano from March to November 2023, known as the "Siren Arc".

One day, while Chiikawa and Hachiware were relaxing in the square, Usagi suddenly appeared with a flyer stuck to its face. When Hachiware checked the flyer, it was an invitation reading “Special Invitation to a Special Island.”

Lured by promises like “Get 100x rewards for simple island quests!” and “Limited-edition island ramen, exclusive sweets—sweet and spicy treats all practically free!”, Chiikawa and the others decided to go on the island retreat. Boarding the ship alongside Rakko, who was suspicious of the flyer's contents, the group landed on the island... only to find something waiting for them there...!?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

title.native: 我々は宇宙人

description:
One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than thirty years, this gentle, contemplative story invites the audience to reflect on the meaning of life through the paths their lives take.

(Source: NOTHING NEW)

title.english: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
title.native: 레드슈즈

description: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy. A parody with a twist.

title.native: ガールズ＆パンツァー 最終章 第5話

description: The fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou film series.

title.romaji: Kusuriya no Hitorigoto: Bouhi no Hihou
title.native: 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝

description:
An original movie for Kusuriya no Hitorigoto

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: 白蛇3：浮生

description: Xiaobai finally found Xu Xian, the reincarnation of Axuan, after 500 years, the two met on the Broken Bridge. Xiaobai and sister hid in the streets and alleys, started a lively life in human world with him and his brother-in-law Li Gongfu.

title.english: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend
title.romaji: Seishun Buta Yarou wa Dear Friend no Yume wo Minai
title.native: 青春ブタ野郎はディアフレンドの夢を見ない

description:
Theatrical follow-up to Seishun Buta Yarou wa Santa Claus no Yume wo Minai.

"Actually, I’m Touko Kirishima."

The audience erupted in excitement upon learning that the true identity of the mysterious, wildly popular internet singer was none other than the nation’s favorite actress, Mai Sakurajima. The scene was exactly the same as the dream Sakuta Azusagawa had seen on Christmas Eve.

Starting with Mai’s shocking confession on April 1, the impossible events that everyone once dreamed of keep happening one after another. The social media hashtag "#Yumemiru," where dreams come true, has vanished, and as Sakuta struggles with the disconnect between the reality before him and his own perception, he receives a message from a version of himself in an alternate reality.

―Stop Touko Kirishima,
―Before reality is rewritten.

To restore the world to its original state, Sakuta sets out to find Touko Kirishima. This is a story about overcoming the "Adolescent Syndrome".

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title.native: DEATH STRANDING MOSQUITO (Working Title)

description:
Announced at the Kojima Productions 10th anniversary event: an anime film set in the “Death Stranding” video game series.

Note: Title and Relations are provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.

title.native: 名探偵プリキュア！不思議な庭と2人の秘密

A new movie to commemorate Assassination Classroom's 10th anniversary of the TV anime.

It adapts episodes previously omitted in the original anime series.

An anthology series adapting 8 short stories created by manga artist Tatsuki Fujimoto between ages 17 and 26.

1) A Couple Clucking Chickens Were Still Kickin' in the Schoolyard (Dir. Seishirou Nagaya, ZEXCS)

3) Love is Blind (Dir. Nobuyuki Takeuchi, Lapin Track)

5) Mermaid Rhapsody (Dir. Tetsuaki Watanabe, 100Studio)
6) Woke-Up-as-a-Girl Syndrome (Dir. Kazuaki Terasawa, Studio Kafka)
7) Nayuta of the Prophecy (Dir. Tetsuaki Watanabe, 100Studio)
8) Sisters (Dir. Osamu Honma, P.A.WORKS)

Note: This anime had a pre-release world premiere at the "Global Stage Hollywood 2025" film festival on October 5, 2025. A general two-week theatrical run in Japan divided into two parts released on the same day October 17, 2025. The anime series later streamed worldwide in Amazon Prime Video on November 8, 2025.

title.romaji: BanG Dream! Ave Mujica: prima aurora
title.native: BanG Dream! Ave Mujica prima aurora

description: Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change when more info is announced.

title.english: Gintama the Movie 2026: Yoshiwara in Flames
title.native: 新劇場版 銀魂 -吉原大炎上-

description:
Movie remake of the Yoshiwara Enjou arc.

Upon meeting a young boy named Haruta who makes a living as a pickpocket, Gintoki discovers that he is pickpocketing out of a desire to meet his long-lost mother, Hiwa, Yoshiwara's number one courtesan. Gintoki and his friends venture to Yoshiwara to fulfill Haruta's wish, but standing in their way is Housen, the Night King who rules Yoshiwara.

Note: This anime was announced at the "Gintama Multiverse Festival," an event held on August 16th, as part of the "Gintama 20th Anniversary Project." This movie features volumes 25 and 26 of the manga, and the TV anime series spans eight episodes, from episodes 139 to 146.

title.native: ゴールデンカムイ 札幌ビール工場編

description: Tidak ada deskripsi.

title.native: bâan -大人の彊界-

description:
A story of two people in search of a new life, who leave their birthplaces - travelling to a whole different world trying to find a place where they truly belong. Set in the fictional world of Euthania, a land rich in nature with various magical races based on South East Asian Mythology, which is connected to Japan via a warp gate.

(Source: Official Trailer)

title.native: 迷宮のしおり

description:
One day, Shiori Maezawa, an ordinary high school girl, cracked her smartphone while falling down a staircase. As she wakes up, she finds herself in a deserted, parallel world that looks like Yokohama.

When she looks at her smartphone, she finds a photo of herself that she doesn't remember posting on social media. What’s the source of this mysterious post?

Will she be able to escape from this strange smartphone labyrinth?

(Source: Official Site, translated)

title.native: Summer Pockets 久島鴎編

description:
Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Kamome Kushima's storyline from the anime series.

Kamome, who once visited Torishiro Island as a child reveals that her purpose in coming to the island is to "search for treasure", and thus sets off on an adventure with Hairi.

What is the treasure hidden on the island? And what is the past that connects the two of them?

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title.native: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」無限城編 第終章

description: Part 3 of the theatrical trilogy adaptation of the Infinity Castle Arc.

title.english: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle Part 2
title.native: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」無限城編 第二章

description: Part 2 of the theatrical trilogy adaptation of the Infinity Castle Arc.

title.native: ghost／夜の果て

description:
Everyone has a "ghost" in their hearts. It is a genuine feeling that is there but inexpressible. In this work, the girl Nike opposes the absurdity of the world in order to protect the "starry sky." This challenging work expresses Nike's solitude and heroism, and the subtleties of the heart as she interacts with others.

(Source: Bandai Namco Filmworks Press Release via Anime News Network)

title.romaji: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party
title.native: ラブライブ！蓮ノ空女学院スクールアイドルクラブ Bloom Garden Party

description:
The Bloom Garden Party is finally here. It’s the stage where everyone will “someday, surely” bloom—the goal Kaho and the others have been chasing for a whole year. This is the first step.

The long-awaited day has finally arrived — the day when the promise they made with the graduates will come true. It was also the last day for the 103rd-year students, on the verge of graduation, could spend with their friends as students of Hasunosora.

―Even so, the girls race through their “youth” with all their might. This is the story of girls who struggled to bloom, a tale of dreams made real together.

(Source: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club: Bloom Garden Party Site, translated)

title.native: 最終楽章 響け！ユーフォニアム後編

description:
Sequel to Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Zenpen.

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.native: FOXING: Kitsuné-tsuki (きつねつき)

description:
Shinano is a character designer drifting through a monotonous routine. Her work is absorbed into a commercially driven system, and on social media, she feels no sense of belonging, deepening her loneliness.

One day, Koyami—a fox-masked character from her old doodles—appears, followed by other discarded creations, blurring reality and imagination.

As she wanders through her own mind, Shinano realizes they are fragments of herself—the shape of her loneliness—and chooses to keep creating while living with it.

title.romaji: Tooi-san wa Seishun Shitai! "Baka to SmaPho to Romance to"
title.native: 遠井さんは青春したい！『バカとスマホとロマンスと』

description:
Tooi, an ordinary high school girl, was expecting a normal school life—until everything changed on her very first day.

After catching the attention of the unpredictable and overly energetic classmate Jel, she's suddenly roped into the mysterious "Youth Romance Club," a bizarre school group dedicated to chasing down anything that feels "youthful" or "romantic."

What should've been a carefree club quickly spirals into chaotic antics, with Tooi constantly playing the straight man to everyone's nonsense. To make things even wilder, the club's antics start getting streamed online!

Between laughter, unexpected twists, and even a mysterious incident, this unpredictable school life is just getting started.

title.native: トリツカレ男

description:
The story centers on a young man named Giuseppe, who is called "Toristukare Otoko" by the townspeople because once he gets absorbed in something, he cannot look at anything else. One day, he falls in love at first sight with a girl selling balloons named Pechka. He goes crazy and tries to get closer to Pechka, but she has a sadness in her heart and... For the sake of his beloved Pechka, Giuseppe and his partner, the mouse Cielo, secretly solve her worries by using the many tricks he has been obsessed with.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title.english: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Hidden Inventory / Premature Death – The Movie
title.native: 呪術廻戦 懐玉・玉折

description:
"The strongest duo—A youth they can never return to."

Recompilation film of Jujutsu Kaisen 2nd Season's "Kaigyoku・Gyokusetsu" (Hidden Inventory / Premature Death) arc (episodes 1-5 re-edited) with new footage showing glimpses of school memories accompanied by an acoustic version of "Ao no Sumika" (Where Our Blue Is) by Tatsuya Kitani.

Before they were enemies, Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto were high school classmates and friends. The two most powerful sorcerers are tasked with protecting Riko Amanai, a student who has been designated to be sacrificed as the Star Plasma Vessel, until she can fulfill her duty. Pursued by a religious cult and other curse users, they are the only sorcerers capable of carrying out such a difficult task – but this mission will set their destinies, and challenge the two sorcerers in ways unimaginable.

(Source: GKIDS)

title.native: 이 별에 필요한

description:
In 2050 Seoul, astronaut Nan-young’s ultimate goal is to visit Mars. But she fails the final test to onboard the fourth Mars Expedition Project. The musician Jay buries his dreams in a vintage audio equipment shop. The two fall in love after a chance encounter. As they root for each other and dream of a new future. Nan-young is given another chance to fly to Mars, which is all she ever wanted…

(Source: Netflix)

title.native: ひな菊の人生

description:
“Daisy's Life” follows the emotional journey of a six-year-old girl named Daisy, who loses her mother in a tragic accident and struggles to adapt to life with her aunt. One sleepless night, she encounters a mysterious girl named Dahlia at her window. Their days together begin to transcend time and space, bringing a cosmic perspective to Daisy's modest life in a downtown yakisoba restaurant.

(Source: Variety)

title.native: クスノキの番人

description: Adaptation of Keigo Hagashino's Kusunoki no Bannin novel about a mysterious camphor tree that is said to grant wishes if you pray to it, and the young man who becomes its guardian.

title.native: 新選組

description: Produced for Fuji TV in 2000, the film reinterprets the story of a special samurai force - the Shinsengumi - at the end of the Edo period.

title.native: 最終楽章 響け！ユーフォニアム 前編

description:
The music isn’t over yet!

“Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie” is coming in 2026!

title.romaji: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
title.native: ガールズ＆パンツァー もっとらぶらぶ作戦です！

description:
Four part adaptation of the Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu! manga.

(Source: Natalie Comics)

title.native: ALL YOU NEED IS KILL

description:
After an unidentified plant from outer space invasion, Rita finds herself trapped in a time loop, forced to relive the same day over and over again. With each loop, she learns. She fights. Her memories and experiences sharpen her skills, turning her into a formidable warrior. Yet, the endless cycle of death and solitude begins to wear her down. Then, she meets Keiji. "I've been repeating this day too," he says. Two lost souls, trapped in an endless war. Could their meeting change fate?

(Source: Warner Bros. Japan Anime)

Note: The film received an early premiere at the 2025 Annecy International Animation Film Festival on June 9, 2025.

title.native: (Title to be Announced)

description: Feature film project directed by Kazuki Kawagoe.

title.romaji: Kidou Senshi Gundam: Senkou no Hathaway Movie 3 (Provisional Title)
title.native: 機動戦士ガンダム 閃光のハサウェイ 第3作（仮題）

description: Third movie in the Hathaway trilogy celebrating the Gundam franchise's 40th anniversary.

title.romaji: Nezha: Zhi Mo Tong Nao Hai
title.native: 哪吒之魔童闹海

description:
After the heavenly lightning, although Ne Zha and Ao Bing survived by becoming Spirits, they would soon dissipate completely. Taiyi plans to rebuild Ne Zha and Ao Bing's mortal bodies with the Seven-colored Precious Lotus. However, during the process of reconstruction, numerous obstacles arise. What will become of the fate of Ne Zha and Ao Bing?

(Source: AMC)

title.native: シノアリス 一番最後のモノガタリ

description:
Alice's life has been miserable ever since she started playing SINoALICE. In despair at the world, she takes her own life, but wakes up and finds herself within the game, interacting with the game's navigator characters Parrah and Noya, who throw every despair of her previous life at her. As Parrah and Noya take Alice away, the game's characters plan to face the two.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: プリンセス・プリンシパル Crown Handler 第4章

description: The fourth out of six movie sequels to the Princess Principal TV series.

title.native: ChaO

description:
In a futuristic world where humans and mermaids coexist, ChaO follows Stephan, a mild-mannered office worker at a shipbuilding company, whose life is upended when he is suddenly proposed to by Chao — a princess from the mermaid kingdom. With no time to make sense of what’s happening, Stephan soon finds himself living with the unpredictable, wholehearted Chao. As her sincere love begins to break down his emotional barriers, an unexpected and touching romance begins to unfold.

(Source: GKIDS)

title.romaji: "Aesop" no Ohanashi yori: Ushi to Kaeru, Yokubatta Inu
title.native: “いそっぷ”のおはなしより　牛とかえる、よくばった犬

description: Tidak ada deskripsi.

title.native: Metamorphose.

description: Short film by Kiyoshi Nishimoto.

title.native: 笑う月

description:
Twelve pieces separated from a circle and a square combine together and shape into various figures, and play slapstick chasing.
An attempt at a minimal animation transforming images with simple figures, movement, sounds.

title.native: 果てしなきスカーレット

description:
Scarlet, the protagonist of this work, is a princess whose father, the king of a certain country, was murdered. However, after failing to exact revenge, Scarlet wakes up to find herself in the "Otherlands."

In this "Otherlands," filled with madness, it is said that if one does not exact revenge on their nemesis and reach the "Infinity Land," they will become "nothingness" and disappear from existence.

Will Scarlet be able to exact revenge on her nemesis without becoming "nothingness"? The story unfolds as the endless journey for revenge begins.

(Source: Animate Times, Translated)

title.native: アルドノア・ゼロ（Re+）

description: A movie compilation of the first and second cours of Aldnoah.Zero and also includes the new animation to conclude the series, Aldnoah.Zero: Ame no Danshou -The Penultimate Truth-.

title.english: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
title.romaji: The Lord of the Rings: Rohan no Tatakai
title.native: ロード・オブ・ザ・リング／ローハンの戦い

description:
183 years before the events chronicled in the original trilogy, a sudden attack by Wulf, a clever and ruthless Dunlending lord seeking vengeance for the death of his father, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Hèra, the daughter of Helm, must summon the will to lead the resistance against a deadly enemy intent on their total destruction.

(Source: Warner Bros.)

title.romaji: Ore dake Level Up na Ken: ReAwakening
title.native: 俺だけレベルアップな件 -ReAwakening-

description: A movie compilation of the first season and first two episodes of the second season of the Solo Leveling series.

title.english: Detective Conan vs. Kid the Phantom Thief
title.native: 名探偵コナンVS怪盗キッド

description: The movie contains cuts from episodes featuring the confrontations between Conan and Kid the Phantom Thief: “Conan vs. Kid the Phantom Thief” and “The Detectives Come Together! Kudo vs. Kid the Phantom Thief”. From birth of the Moonlight Magician, Kid the Phantom Thief, and the first encounter between the greatest and eternal rival Conan / Shinichi, this is a special compilation film of TV series with new footage!

title.native: 世外

description: While helping lost souls to get reborn, the spirit Gudo meets a girl called Yuri. He embarks on a 1,000-year journey to help her through her various incarnations to remove her Seed of Evil, a kernel within her that turns her into a monstrous Wrath if she gets consumed by anger. He learns that helping her find self-forgiveness for the tragic loss of her brother is the only way to save her.

title.native: ホライズンブル

description:
It depicts the problems of child abuse and dysfunctional families in Japan.
Harada, who completed "Midori", made this movie alone over 24 years.

(Source: YouTube description)

title.native: 아가미

description:
A boy called Gon was on the verge of death, when suddenly gills started to grow and he could breathe again. Kang Ha and his grandpa rescue Gon and together they become an odd family. This film explores life's paradoxes, blessings and curses. It will encourage you to think about your own "gills" to help you get through your life.

(Source: Annecy Festival)

title.romaji: Love Live! Nijigasaki Gakuen School Idol Doukoukai: Kanketsu-hen 2
title.native: ラブライブ！虹ヶ咲学園スクールアイドル同好会 完結編 第2章

description: The second in the trilogy of Love Live! Nijigasaki Gakuen School Idol Doukoukai films that continues the story beyond season two and the OVA.

title.english: The Dangers in My Heart: The Movie
title.romaji: Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu Movie
title.native: 劇場版 僕の心のヤバイやつ

description: A re-edit of both anime seasons featuring newly added footage and will depict the story of Ichikawa and Yamada after the events of the TV series.

title.english: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea
title.romaji: Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken: Soukai no Namida-hen
title.native: 劇場版 転生したらスライムだった件 蒼海の涙編

description:
The second movie in the Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken series.

After concluding the opening ceremony of the Demon Kingdom Federation Tempest, Rimuru and his companions are invited by the Celestial Emperor Hermesia of the great elven nation – the Magi Dynasty Salion – to visit her private resort island. As the group enjoys their brief vacation, a mysterious woman named Yura appears. A new incident unfolds against the backdrop of the boundless azure sea.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.english: Senpai is an Otokonoko Movie: Sunshine After the Rain
title.romaji: Senpai wa Otokonoko: Ame Nochi Hare
title.native: 先輩はおとこのこ あめのち晴れ

description: Theatrical follow-up to the TV anime Senpai wa Otokonoko.

title.native: 傷物語 -こよみヴァンプ-

description:
Compilation film of the three Kizumonogatari movies.

Spring break, an interval of time between the second and third year of high school. It was one fateful evening when Koyomi Araragi encounters her.

Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade.
Legendary Vampire. Killer of Apparitions. King of Apparitions.

Her legs and arms were cruelly torn apart, her extravagant dress soaked in red; she's a monster who finds herself in a tragic state, laying in a pool of her own blood. However, Koyomi finds her to be beautiful this way.

On the brink of death after losing her four limbs, she asks Koyomi to save her. After experiencing fear, chaos, and finally conflict, Koyomi gives his own blood in order to save her. But when he awakens, he finds himself re-born as her vampire kin.

Koyomi wishes to revert to being a human from a vampire. However, he must take back all of Kiss-shot's limbs to do so. Working as a negotiator, Meme Oshino stands in middle ground as Koyomi attempts to recapture her four limbs by challenging three powerful vampire hunters.

This hellish spring break, the final one of his high school life, is only just beginning.

(Source: KIZUMONOGATARI -Koyomi Vamp- Official USA Website, edited)

title.english: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A lonely dragon wants to be loved
title.romaji: Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon: Samishigariya no Ryuu
title.native: 小林さんちのメイドラゴン さみしがりやの竜

description:
Theatrical follow-up to the second season Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon S and Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon S: Nippon no Omotenashi (Attend wa Dragon desu) OVA.

"I don’t want to let go of her hand. Because, we are a family."

Miss Kobayashi, Tohru, Kanna, and Iruru's peaceful lives are shattered when Kanna’s father, Kamun Kamui, leader of the Chaos Forces, arrives and forces her to return to the Dragon World to fix a past mistake. With a war brewing between Chaos and Harmony, Kanna must find a way to unite the two worlds but is torn between her loyalty to her friends and her father's demands. Miss Kobayashi, however, refuses to let her go and tries to mend Kanna and Kamui’s broken bond. As dragons clash, Iruru uncovers a hidden force manipulating the war. Can they stop the war before it consumes both worlds?

(Source: Kyoto Animation YouTube Channel, Crunchyroll)

title.native: ヴァージン・パンク Clockwork Girl

description:
The year is 2099.
Humanity has advanced, overcoming all injuries and illnesses with the development of the Medical Android Technology “Somadea.” However, along with the development of Somadea, crimes misusing said technology have rapidly increased.

Somadea grants physical abilities far superior to those of normal flesh and blood, and by illegally modifying it, Somadea can be misused for criminal purposes.

To deal with these Somadea crimes, the government established the Bounty Hunter System. Civilians registered as bounty hunters are permitted to kill illegal Somadea users designated as wanted criminals by the police. In return, they are rewarded with large amounts of bounty money.

Conditions for Receiving Bounty:
Bring the brain of a wanted criminal possessing illegal Somadea to authorities.
Whether the target is alive or dead…is irrelevant.

In this unforgiving world, Ubu Kamigori makes a living hunting down criminals as a bounty hunter. But one day, when she returns home from a job, she finds the man with whom she has a sordid history waiting there – Mr. Elegance. And so, her destiny begins to unravel.

A tale woven by mechanical girls and the smell of gunpowder smoke, this suspenseful action begins!

(Source: Aniplex USA, edited)

title.romaji: Inazuma Eleven: Aratanaru Eiyuutachi no Joshou
title.native: イナズマイレブン 新たなる英雄たちの序章

description: Adaptation of the prologue of "Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road" video game.

title.romaji: Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen - Densetsu no Kickoff
title.native: イナズマイレブン総集編 伝説のキックオフ

description: Compilation film of Inazuma Eleven; a recap of the original video game and the first 26 episodes of the series which focuses on the matches.

title.native: 怪獣8号 第1期総集編

description:
Compilation movie of Kaijuu 8-gou.

In a Kaiju-filled Japan, Kafka Hibino works in monster disposal. After reuniting with his childhood friend Mina Ashiro, a rising star in the anti-Kaiju Defense Force, he decides to pursue his abandoned dream of joining the Force... when he suddenly transforms into the powerful "Kaiju No. 8." With help from his junior colleague Reno Ichikawa, Kafka hides his identity while striving towards his life-long dream of passing the Defense Force exam and standing at Mina's side. But when a mysterious intelligent Kaiju attacks a Defense Force base, Kafka faces a crucial decision in a desperate situation...

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.english: COLORFUL STAGE! The Movie: A Miku Who Can't Sing
title.romaji: Project Sekai: Kowareta SEKAI to Utaenai MIKU
title.native: プロジェクトセカイ 壊れたセカイと歌えないミク

description:
Set in modern day Shibuya, Ichika Hoshino, a high school girl and street musician, encounters an unknown version of Hatsune Miku after hearing a Miku song that she'd never heard before in a CD store. Ichika learns that this version of Miku is having trouble reaching people with her songs, so together they team up to try to touch the hearts of their audience through music.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title.native: モノノ怪 蛇神

description: The third movie in the Mononoke movie trilogy.

title.english: Mononoke The Movie: Chapter II - The Ashes of Rage
title.native: モノノ怪 火鼠

description:
Sequel to Mononoke: Karakasa and second movie in the Mononoke movie trilogy.

The Medicine Seller returns as the Edo harem faces a new crisis, with family feuds, inner turmoil and fiery envy igniting the birth of a raging spirit.

(Source: Netflix)

title.native: チュウチュウバンバン

description: Tidak ada deskripsi.

title.native: SHE

description: A film by Keiichi Tanaami.

title.native: 幼視景（序章）

description: A short film by Keiichi Tanaami.

title.native: GROTESQQQUE -グロテスク-

description:
Anthology movie consisting of three original animation segments:

Q1 - ÆLIENS (エリィアンズ):
Earth has entered an era of intergalatic exchange.
Amidst swirling prejudice and fear of aliens, Elie, an alien girl, arrives as a space goodwill ambassador. She loves Earth's culture and its often absurd daily life, and has teamed up with a civil servant working at the space agency to search for "friends".

Q2 - Yotsuyushika★Shoujo (夜露死駆★少女):
GALs TOKYO, a city where morning never comes.
Night after night, girls who have lost their place in reality, known as "Gal P", gather here. Their goal is to become the winner, the "Queen" in a game called "Queen of Butterfly" or "QoB" for short.

Q3 - Nocturne: Kono Grotesque Yoru ni (ノクターン～このグロテスクな夜に～):
A world after humanity has perished.
Traveling in a van are Ayame, a pure-blooded vampire, and three girls who survived by being bitten and "infected" by her. There, they find a sky full of stars that illuminate the night as brightly as day, and fields of glittering golden grass—even a desolate world looks so beautiful through the eyes of a vampire.
They enjoy a simple everyday life in this world left behind.

(Souce: Official Website, translated)

title.english: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
title.romaji: Kimetsu no Yaiba: Mugenjou-hen Movie 1 - Akaza Sairai
title.native: 劇場版「鬼滅の刃」無限城編 第一章 猗窩座再来

description:
Part 1 of the theatrical trilogy adaptation of the Infinity Castle Arc.

Tanjiro Kamado – a boy who joined an organization dedicated to hunting down demons called the Demon Slayer Corps after his younger sister Nezuko was turned into a demon.

While growing stronger and deepening his friendships and bonds with fellow corps members, Tanjiro has battled many demons with his comrades – Zenitsu Agatsuma and Inosuke Hashibira. Along the way, his journey has led him to fight alongside the Demon Slayer Corps’ highest-ranking swordsmen, the Hashira, including Flame Hashira Kyojuro Rengoku aboard the Mugen Train, Sound Hashira Tengen Uzui within the Entertainment District, as well as Mist Hashira Muichiro Tokito and Love Hashira Mitsuri Kanroji at the Swordsmith Village.

As the Demon Slayer Corps members and Hashira engaged in a group strength training program, the Hashira Training, in preparation for the forthcoming battle against the demons, Muzan Kibutsuji appears at the Ubuyashiki Mansion. With the head of the Demon Corps in danger, Tanjiro and the Hashira rush to the headquarters but are plunged into a deep descent to a mysterious space by the hands of Muzan Kibutsuji.

The destination of where Tanjiro and Demon Slayer Corps have fallen is the demons’ stronghold – the Infinity Castle. And so, the battleground is set as the final battle between the Demon Slayer Corps and the demons ignites.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.romaji: Genjitsu no Yohane: SUNSHINE in the MIRROR Movie
title.native: 幻日のヨハネ -SUNSHINE in the MIRROR- 劇場総集編

description: Theatrical compilation of Genjitsu no Yohane: Sunshine in the Mirror announced during the Love Live! Sunshine! Aqours 9th Anniversary Project Presentation.

title.english: Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull
title.romaji: Fuuto Tantei: Kamen Rider Skull no Shouzou
title.native: 風都探偵 仮面ライダースカルの肖像

description:
What happened to Shoutarou, Phillip, and Sokichi Narumi on the night "Kamen Rider W" was born?.....

After the escape from Shadow Fuuto and subsequent battle, Tokime resolves herself seeking out the truth behind the origins of Gaia Memories, Kamen Rider W, and her connection to that shadowy city. Later than night, Shoutarou has a heart to heart with Tokime recounting his painful past and fateful night where everything began, named by Phillip: "Begins Night". A story when dopants started to appear in Fuuto and how a young Shoutarou became private investigator Sokichi's assistant, and tried to follow in his footsteps.

Note: An adaptation of Fuuto P.I. volume #6, which is a extended version of the "Begins Night" chapter from the original Live-Action Kamen Rider W series.

title.english: The Irregular at Magic High School THE MOVIE -Yotsuba Succession Arc-
title.romaji: Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei: Yotsuba Keishou-hen
title.native: 劇場版 魔法科高校の劣等生 四葉継承編

description:
Movie adaptation of Mahouka Koukou no Rettousei's Yotsuba Succession Arc.

The invitation has arrived. It is time for the New Year’s Reception at the Yotsuba family residence. This year, Miyuki and other candidates will gather there to decide who will be the next leader of their powerful clan. If chosen as the successor, she would never have to see her brother live as a pariah ever again. At the same time, such a position surely entails a political marriage, plunging her mind into complete turmoil. Complicating matters, the current head of their family sows doubt with the shocking claim that Miyuki is not Tatsuya’s sister. When the new year comes, their relationship may be changed forever...

(Source: Yen Press)

title.native: 銀魂オンシアター2D 金魂篇

description: Theatrical cut of the Kintama Arc (episodes 253-256). The movie is a part of the "Gintama 20th Anniversary Project".

title.native: ニンジャバットマン対ヤクザリーグ

description:
In this sequel to Batman Ninja, the Batman family has returned to the present to discover that Japan has disappeared, and a giant island - Hinomoto - is now in the sky over Gotham City. At the top sit the Yakuza, a group of superpowered individuals who reign without honor or humanity and look suspiciously like the Justice League. Now, it’s up to Batman and his allies to save Gotham!

(Source: Amazon Prime Video)

Note: Release date reflects the release in Japan. The film was released in the US on March 18, 2025.

title.native: ひゃくえむ。

description:
100 METERS follows Togashi, a track star who is born to run. As a kid, he is naturally gifted and wins every 100-meter race without effort. But in sixth grade, he meets Komiya, a transfer student who is full of determination but lacks technique. In teaching him, Togashi gives Komiya a new purpose: to win no matter what. Years pass by, and Togashi and Komiya meet again as rivals on the track and reveal their true selves.

(Source: GKIDS)

title.native: ホウセンカ

description:
"What a pathetic life it’s been."

An elderly inmate serving a life sentence awaits a lonely death in his solitary cell—until a voice calls out to him. It belongs to a balsam flower, Housenka, that speaks like a human. Through their "conversation," the old man begins to reflect on the life he’s led.

(Source: Annecy Festival)

title.native: おでかけ子ザメ とかいのおともだち

description:
Kozame-chan's everyday life is full of fun and excitement! This time, the next destination is the big city. What awaits Kozame-chan is an unfamiliar place, and new friends. A big adventure filed with tiny miracles is about to begin.

(Source: Youtube)

Note: The film received an early premiere at the Tokyo International Shark Film Festival on August 3, 2025.

title.native: 花緑青が明ける日に

description:
The Obinata Fireworks Shop factory is getting prepared for an administrative action for confiscation tomorrow. It has been six years since Keitaro has been holed up in a closed-down factory creating fireworks by himself, chasing after an illusion of his father who vanished. It is a story about three young people who overcome the extreme weather conditions, disasters and environmental problems imposed on them and establish their own identities.

(Source: Marché du Film Festival de Cannes)

*The film was selected for the 77th Cannes Film Festival’s 2024 Annecy Animation Showcase.
*Note: Initially slated for a 2025 release, on May 20th of the same year the movie was delayed to 2026.

title.native: 魚の魚

description:
Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru".

A small white fish enters the frame and is eaten by a larger one, then the latter is in turn eaten by an even larger fish… At the end, only a huge white fish remains which seems to shrink in size. swimming towards the bottom of the screen. He leaves the frame and the cycle resumes.

title.native: JUBITO

description: Saeko Suzuki's 3rd year student work at Tama Art University.

title.native: KILLTUBE

description:
KILLTUBE is a animated project that exudes the theme "Edopunk". It depicts Tokyo's Shibuya and Shinjuku districts in a parallel world, where the Edo shogunate has closed off Japan and carried on for over four centuries into 2026. In this isolated, stratified society, the only way to change one's standing in life is through participating in live-streamed mortal combat.

The battle entertainment story unfolds when an unlikely trio from the lowest depths of society withstand ridicule and aim for the top. As they win over the general public, they discover the hidden truth behind the KILLTUBE system.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.romaji: 30-sai made Doutei da to Mahou Tsukai ni Nareru Rashii: Tokubetsu-hen
title.native: 30歳まで童貞だと魔法使いになれるらしい 特別編

description: Movie compiling 30-sai made Doutei da to Mahou Tsukai ni Nareru Rashii which also has new footage content not in the TV anime.

title.native: しらぬひ

description:
The short is set in a coastal town in Kumamoto at the tail end of summer 1996. The 10-year-old boy Minato lives a precarious life with his drunkard father. Minato's only source of strength is Ben-chan, a goddess in the form of a young girl that appeared in Benten Island. The time he spends with her are the only times where he feels like himself. But when he is about to be separated from Ben-chan due to being sent to a children's home, Minato prays to a Shiranuhi, a mysterious light floating above the sea, to grant him one wish. His wish, filled with hatred towards his father, eventually becomes a curse.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Note: Initially teased at AnimeJapan 2024 in the CoMix Wave Films booth, a visual of this project was shown off with a description being a new animation project by a "rookie director".

title.native: がんばっていきまっしょい

description:
A high-school girl, Etsuko, just spends her days without any aims or purpose, until one day, Riina, a transfer student, asks her help to set up a boat club. Although Etsuko reluctantly accepts after hearing Riina speak passionately about her dream, she gradually starts to embrace the club after spending time with her teammates.

(Source: Annecy Festival)

title.romaji: Nintama Rantarou: Dokutake Ninja-tai Saikyоu no Gunshi
title.native: 劇場版 忍たま乱太郎 ドクタケ忍者隊最強の軍師

description:
Rantaro, Kirimaru, and Shinbei are far from being excellent ninjas. Training at an elite ninjutsu academy in historical Japan, they are accompanied by their tongue-in-cheek friends, ninja masters, and idol senior ninja trainees. Rantaro and his ninja-in-training pals are called "nintama" — a combination of "ninja" and "tamago" ("egg"). The story of the film begins when Doi-sensei disappears after being challenged to a duel by Moroizumi Sonnamon, a tasogaredoki ninja. While Yamada-sensei and the 6th graders of the Ninjutsu Academy search for Doi-sensei, a man dressed in white suddenly appears at the Academy!

(Source: Japanese Canadian Cultural Centre)

title.native: ハイキュー!! VS 小さな巨人

description: Sequel to Haikyuu!!: Gomi Suteba no Kessen. The second film of Haikyuu!! FINAL.

title.native: ルックバック

description:
Ayumu Fujino is a fourth grader who draws a manga strip for the school newspaper. Her art makes her the star of the class, but one day she's told that Kyomoto, a student who refuses to come to school, would also like to submit a manga for the paper...

(Source: MANGA Plus, edited)

title.native: 大室家 dear friends

description:
A spin-off of the Yuru Yuri series featuring Sakurako and her sisters. The second film of the Oomuro-ke duology.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: 数分間のエールを

description:
The film's story begins when a high schooler who makes music videos meets a teacher who has given up on music. Amateur music video creator Kanata Asaya sees teacher and musician Yuu Orie busking on the street, and decides to make a music video of her music.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.romaji: PUI PUI Molcar the Movie MOLMAX
title.native: PUI PUI モルカー ザ・ムービー MOLMAX

description:
The story begins with the emergence of the first high-tech molcar in Molcity, with drivers beginning to ride state-of-the-art AI-driven Molcars. Potato and friends get involved in a chase between a mysterious organization and a Molcar AI named Canon, and are saved by a talented driver. Potato finds out that the driver is in search of his missing Molcar, and gets the idea to use Canon's AI functionality to help with the search.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.english: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Beginning of a New Era
title.romaji: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - Shin Jidai no Tobira
title.native: ウマ娘 プリティーダービー 新時代の扉

description:
REACH OUT AND GRASP GREATNESS.

Jungle Pocket, known to her close friends as "Pokke," is a free-spirited Umamusume who has proven her dominance in the freestyle racing scene. Overwhelmed by Fuji Kiseki's majestic performance at a graded Twinkle Series race, she resolves to take on the Twinkle Series herself.

Shortly after joining the Umamusume training school Tracen Academy, Pokke comes under the wing of Tanabe, a veteran trainer who fostered Fuji Kiseki's talent. Together, they aspire to dominate the Triple Crown series, a set of three races that can only be attempted once in a lifetime. Awaiting them are formidable rivals of Pokke's generation, whose talents surpass even her own.

There's Dantsu Flame, whose diligence and determination to win are second to none; Manhattan Cafe, who chases the shadowy silhouette of a "friend" that only she can see; and Agnes Tachyon, a veritable mad scientist seeking to push the very boundaries of what is possible for Umamusume.

These four runners take to the track with their very pride, spirit, and souls on the line. Past the finish of their epic clash is a door waiting to be opened—one that leads to the beginning of a new era.

"It doesn't matter who stands in my way! I'm gonna be the greatest!"

(Source: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Beginning of a New Era Site)

title.native: うたの☆プリンスさまっ♪ TABOO NIGHT XXXX

description: The third movie in the UtaPri franchise, spotlighting the idol group QUARTET NIGHT.

title.romaji: Kage no Jitsuryokusha ni Naritakute!: Zankyou-hen
title.native: 劇場版 陰の実力者になりたくて！ 残響編

description: Theatrical follow-up to Kage no Jitsuryokusha ni Naritakute! 2nd season.

title.english: Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc
title.native: チェンソーマン レゼ篇

description:
Theatrical follow-up to Chainsaw Man.

Denji became “Chainsaw Man”, a boy with a devil’s heart, and is now part of Special Division 4’s devil hunters. After a date with Makima, the woman of his dreams, Denji takes shelter from the rain. There he meets Reze, a girl who works in a café.

(Source: MAPPA CHANNEL)

title.native: トラペジウム

description:
Driven by an unwavering passion for becoming an idol, Yuu Azuma, a young, ambitious first-year student at Joshuu East High School, embarks on a journey to form an idol group. To make her dream a reality, she recruits one girl from each of her region’s four high schools (located to the north, east, south and west) and soon finds her fellow group members.

Joining Yuu is Ranko Kashima, a sophisticated second-year student at Holy Teneritas Southern Girls’ Academy, with a distinctive curly hairstyle and admiration for Ochou-fujin ("Madame Butterfly"); Kurumi Taiga, a student at West Tech Vocational High School, who wears cute, oversized jackets with long sleeves and dreams of winning the championship at a robotics competition; and, Mika Kamei, a student who also hails from Joshuu North High School, is known for being a kind-hearted girl and for her dedication to volunteering.

With the help of Shinji Kudou, Yuu's "collaborator" and confidante, these four young girls set off on the road to stardom. But the journey hides unexpected trials, rigorous demands, setbacks and pressures, threatening to undo all that Yuu has worked so hard for.

(Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

title.romaji: Crayon Shin-chan: Ora-tachi no Kyouryuu Nikki
title.native: クレヨンしんちゃん オラたちの恐竜日記

description:
The 32nd Crayon Shin-chan film. The movie will follow the friendship between the Nobara family's pet dog Shiro and a "small dinosaur." Their connection helps the growth of Shinnosuke and the Kusakabe Defense Squad.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: ふれる。

description:
Aki, Ryou, and Yuuta grew up on a tiny Japanese island with Fureru, a small yellow hedgehog with mysterious powers. Now in their 20s and chasing a fresh start in Tokyo, the trio tries to build new lives while keeping their unusual companion out of sight. But as Fureru’s powers awaken, buried emotions and old tensions reemerge, pushing their friendship into unpredictable new territory.

(Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

title.native: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！ Re:Re:

description: Compilation film of Bocchi the Rock! featuring new animation intro footage and additional scenes. The second of the Bocchi compilation movie duology.

title.english: Ya Boy Kongming! Road to Summer Sonia
title.romaji: Paripi Koumei: Road To Summer Sonia
title.native: パリピ孔明 Road to Summer Sonia

description:
Compilation film of Ya Boy Kongming! The film features new footage in some of Eiko's performances.

The music industry becomes a battlefield when ancient strategist Kongming is transported from historical China to modern Japan. He’ll use military tactics to turn his new friend Eiko into a music star, and together they’ll take the party hotspot of Shibuya by storm! The story is a clever take (and smart twist) on fish-out-of-water and person-out-of-time themes with out-of-this-world results for Ya Boy Kongming!

(Source: HIDIVE)

title.native: 正義のランナー

description:
Tomioka does not fail to deliver in his wild and unique take on the world. His multi-coloured animation talents take us on a whirlwind trip of old school trams with weird and wonderful characters.

(Source: 25FPS Festival)

title.native: ラビッツキングダム THE MOVIE

description:
A project to commemorate the 10th Anniversary of Tsukiuta.

The Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom — Two different worlds existing side by side. The two worlds, which were supposed to be a "pair," had never met, perhaps by a twist of fate. The situation remained unstable and incomplete.

Hajime, the young king of the Balck Rabbit Kingdom, is distressed by the calamities in the surrounding countries. The Prime Minister Haru, his close aides Kakeru and Koi, the prince Aoi, and his escort Arata are busy preparing for the upcoming World Congress and the ball to commemorate the 15th anniversary of Hajime's reign.

At the same time, in the White Rabbit Kingdom at the suggestion of Shuno, who calls himself the Demon King, the king, Kai, the prince, Rui, the guards, Yoh and Iku, and the former military officer, Yoru, are going on a "picnic" to the Black Rabbit Kingdom.

What will be born from the encounter between the Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom?

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

title.native: 名探偵コナン 100万ドルの五稜星

description:
The 27th Detective Conan movie.

A message has arrived from Kid the Phantom Thief, that he will steal a Japanese sword belonging to the wealthy Onoe Family in Hakodate, Hokkaido. Conan and Heiji Hattori, who happened to be in Hakodate, are on the case to capture Kid. Onoe Family's collections are associated with Toshizo Hijikata, a historic figure who perished in Hakodate. Why is Kid, who specializes in jewels, going after a Japanese sword?

Coincidentally the family lawyer of Onoe is found murdered in the warehouse district, apparently slaughtered by a Japanese sword. The suspect is an investor/arms dealer who is said to be after Onoe family's hidden treasure.

The grandfather of Onoe family's patriarch was deeply involved with the army industry during wartime, and it was rumored he hid some powerful weapon that could “change the course of war” somewhere in Hakodate. Is Kid after that weapon? Meanwhile, Heiji is trying to find a perfect viewpoint to declare his love to Kazuha…

In the North among cherry blossoms, the exciting hunt for treasure begins!

(Source: TMS Entertainment USA)

title.native: くだもの

description:
At some point, children diverge from the ideal path set forth for them by adults. The trigger is usually a trivial incident.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

title.native: 限りなき楽園

description: An 8mm animation that was produced by Harada during his high school years.

title.native: 一人之下 锈铁重现

description:
The Nadutong Company where Zhang Chulan and Feng Baobao worked sent a special mission - to escort the former treasured sword "Hiruchiwan" to the border, fulfilling a decades-old agreement with the Ishikawa family of Yingguo. Zhang Chulan and Feng Baobao will face unfamiliar teammates, the harsh Northland weather in winter, and the powerful enemy who is eyeing the knife. A battle to defend "Zhichwan" started in the forest and snow fields.

(Source: Tencent)

title.native: 僕のヒーローアカデミア THE MOVIE: ユア ネクスト

The fourth installment in the Boku no Hero Academia movie franchise.

“Next, it's your turn!”

In a society where heroes and villains continuously battle in the name of peace and chaos, Deku, a U.A. High School student who aspires to be the best hero he can be, confronts the villain who imitates the hero he's long admired. Can Deku and the rest of U.A. High Class 1-A protect the world by putting an end to Dark Might, the man claiming to be the new Symbol of Peace?

(Source: TOHO animation)

title.native: 大室家 dear sisters

description:
A spin-off of the Yuru Yuri series featuring Sakurako and her sisters. The first film of the Oomuro-ke duology.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: 映画ドラえもん のび太の地球交響楽

description:
Music exists in our daily lives for granted. But what would happen if music disappeared from the earth? This is a completely original story about Doraemon and his friends who are trying to save the earth from a crisis with the familiar theme of music!

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

title.english: Don’t you wish you were here?
title.romaji: Don't you wish you were here?
title.native: Don't you wish you were here?
